name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m13408 White】Takashi Murakami Collaboration Series. This clémence wallet is a perfect blend of rich functionality and elegant compact design. Crafted from iconic monogram canvas, the bright leather zipper and lining exude a soft yet lively vibe. 20 x 9 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
